content: It's very difficult to moderate VC.
VC is already unmoderated most of the time no? What harm in a few more unmoderated VC

<@1171539234176389241>
What voice channels do you hope to have? Can you list some for our reference
Music robots can be arranged.
 I will handle all the channel suggestions mentioned so far in one go next week and implement them as soon as possible🙏

<@452731110556696596>Did something happen to the voice live channel? I don't usually manage this channel too much. If there is any violation of community regulations here, you can send me a private message in the background. Thank you very much🙏
No nothing happened. Just saying since nothing bad happened with unmoderated VC, having a few more shouldn't be a problem.
Just adding more normal VC will do but for a more flexible solution. We could have a bot which creates temporary VC channels on command

Hi Goya! I hope everyone's well  <:rizz2:1356053138133614753>  if possible, can we please have one more voice channel for English and the English music bot? One English channel can be for Morimens-related only, and the 2nd channel can be for daily chatting and other things <:wish:1356084702468899117>
